top_candidates.reward_code_head:
def compute_reward(obs, action, next_obs, done, info):
    components = {}
    # component: shaping
    component_0 = float(5.0 * np.exp(-3.0 * np.sqrt(obs[0]**2 + obs[1]**2)))
    component_0 = max(min(component_0, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    components['shaping'] = float(component_0)
    # component: velocity_penalty
    component_1 = float(-0.2 * (abs(obs[2]) + abs(obs[3])))
    component_1 = max(min(component_1, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    components['velocity_penalty'] = float(component_1)
    # component: angle_penalty
    component_2 = float(-0.3 - 0.2 * (abs(obs[4]) + 0.5 * abs(obs[5])))
    component_2 = max(min(component_2, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    components['angle_penalty'] = float(component_2)
    # component: fuel_efficiency
    component_3 = float(-0.0)
    component_3 = max(min(component_3, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    components['fuel_efficiency'] = float(component_3)
    # component: terminal
    component_4 = float(1500.0 * float(done and obs[6] > 0.5 and obs[7] > 0.5 and abs(obs[0]) < 0.2 and abs(obs[1]) < 0.2 and abs(obs[2]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[3]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[4]) < 0.2))
    component_4 = max(min(component_4, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    components['terminal'] = float(component_4)
    total_reward = component_0 + component_1 + component_2 + component_3 + component_4
    total_reward = max(min(total_reward, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    return float(total_reward), components
top_candidates.llm_rationale: The previous generation had a deeply negative private return (-120.9) because the agent crashed instead of landing. Shaping was too weak (7.6 total) to guide toward the pad, while velocity penalty (-47.4) dominated, punishing the velocity needed to navigate. To fix: (1) increase shaping multiplier to 5.0 to provide clear guidance (~50-80 per episode), (2) reduce velocity penalty to -0.2 to allow controlled movement while still penalizing extreme speeds, (3) add a separate explicit survival penalty of -0.3 per step (via angle_penalty) to create urgency without conflating with velocity, (4) increase terminal bonus to 1500 to make successful landing dramatically more rewarding, (5) soften landing tolerances (velocity 0.5, position 0.2) to make landing achievable. This targets: shaping ~60, velocity -15, angle/survival -22, terminal 1500.
